Shop · Shofars · Ram's Horn Shofars

Ram's Horn Shofars

Decorated by hand in 925 silver.

Natural kosher ram's-horn shofars from 30 to 65 cm, each hand-plated in 925 silver. Start with the personalised one, or choose a design and size.

✦ Direct from the Studio ✦

We craft everything by hand and supply stores across Israel and worldwide

All Shofars Custom Ram's Horn Kudu Horn

Custom Ram's Horn Shofar, Symbol & Text

A handmade shofar personalised with your choice of symbol and an optional text inscription (Hebrew/English). Made to order in our studio in Israel.

from ₪742 ≈ $238

* Colors may appear slightly different in person, as each item is handmade.

Ram's Horn Shofar – Hoshen Stones

Ram's-horn shofar decorated in 925 silver with the twelve stones of the High Priest's breastplate (Hoshen). Handmade in Israel.

from ₪418 ≈ $134

* Colors may appear slightly different in person, as each item is handmade.

Ram's-horn shofar decorated in 925 silver with a view of Jerusalem. Handmade in Israel.

Ram's-horn shofar decorated in 925 silver with the Messianic Seal of Jerusalem - the menorah, fish and Star of David. Handmade in Israel.

Ram's-horn shofar decorated in 925 silver with a seven-branched menorah. Handmade in Israel.

* Colors may appear slightly different in person, as each item is handmade.

Notes

The silver plating sometimes comes as one continuous piece, and sometimes in two parts, depending on the shape and size of the horn. If you have a preference, open the shofar you want and write it in the comment box before ordering.

Something different in mind?

Don't see your design?

We craft fully bespoke shofars too - a different symbol, a longer dedication, a special occasion. Send us a sketch, a description or just an idea.

Start a Custom Order
